feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Standard text in purchase order output management.
entry.content:
Hi folks,

My requirment is to add standard text (using maintain standard text app) for both header and item level in Purchase order output management forms. Please let me know how can I pass the standrad text to the form data view and then display it in the adobe form in HANA cloud public edition. NW ABAP Print and Output Management  SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Can Output Management be used for custom forms?
entry.content:
I'm able to put a completely custom form generated PDF into a Print Queue on S/4HANA Public Edition. That's a great start, but it does not enable users to reprint anything.

Output Management does contain that functionality, but as far as I can see that's only available for standard SAP form types. Nor is there an API or Business Object with which I can interact with Output Management. If I interpret the app correctly, Output Management is the step before actual output. From there, a document can be mailed, transferred to a different system or printed. In the latter case, it would then end up in the corresponding Print Queue.

An alternative would be to create a custom Fiori app for it, but we would of course prefer to stick to as much standard apps and functionality as possible.

entry.title: Value help (Business Partner) in Custom Business Object field
entry.content:
I am using S4HANA Cloud public edition.

I have created a Custom Business Object where I want to associate standard value help for certain fields (for example, Business Partner, Material Group etc).

The only option i see there is: Associate Business Objects to the field in my Custom BO.

When I choose this option, there is very limited set of BOs from SAP. Here, I  don't see Business Partner or Material Group BOs in the list, which I am looking for. I don't see an option to associate published CDS view either.

I do understand that there is an option to create a Custom BO and associate it with my current Custom Business Object. As the data I look for resides in standard tables (BP, MatGroup tables in S4),  not sure about the possibility to create a Custom BO referring to standard Business Partner Or Material Group Value help data, to use in my current Custom BO.

Can someone throw some lights on this please

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  @OwenLiu @AndreasRiehl

entry.title: Exploring Custom Business Objects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL
entry.content:
Hello everyone! This is my first blog post, and I'm excited to share my journey exploring SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL. Recently, I had the opportunity to work with Custom Business Objects (CBOs) in the Customizing Tenant. In this post, I'll walk you through the process of creating entries using the ODATA API of a Custom Business Object within the system.

Creating Custom Business Objects

In our project, we started by creating Custom Business Objects in the Customizing Tenant. This process automatically generated a user interface (UI) that allowed us to create entries directly. Here's a quick overview of the steps:

  1. Navigate to the Customizing Tenant: Access the SAP Fiori launchpad and go to the Custom Business Objects app.
  2. Create a New Custom Business Object: Define the object with the necessary fields and attributes.
  3. Generate the UI: Once the object is created, the system generates a UI for data entry. (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-extensibility-cbo-create..html)

Using the ODATA API

Our next task was to create entries using the ODATA API of the Custom Business Object. This required a few prerequisites:

  1. Create a Custom Communication Service: Ensure you have set up a communication service for your Custom Business Object. (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-custom-ui-business-object..html)
  2. Access the Development Tenant: Log in to the Development Tenant and open Eclipse ADT.

Creating a Class in Eclipse ADT

To interact with the ODATA API, we created a class in Eclipse ADT. Here are the steps:

  1. Open Eclipse ADT: Launch Eclipse and log in to your Development Tenant.
  2. Create a New ABAP Class: Use the following template in your class:

We have created a structure with Code & Reason. To know the HTTP Response for our action.(EX : 201 Created, 400 BADRequest..)

We are getting to the implementation part.

LV_URL will have the ODATA Url which you would have got from the Communication Service of your CBO 

From lv_user_id to lv_last_name are the declaration of values which will be used in the payload.

We use cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_url to create an HTTP destination, which represents the connection to the OData service.

  • HTTP Client: An HTTP client is created using cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination.
  • Authorization: Basic authorization is set using set_authorization_basic.
  • Headers: Headers for content type, accept, and CSRF token are set.
  • CSRF Token: The CSRF token is fetched and set in the request header.

The Final Part,

  • Payload: A payload is created with user details and set in the request.
  • POST Request: A POST request is executed to create entries in the Custom Business Object.
  • Response Handling: The response status and reason are captured.

I am creating 3 entries by iteration, so i have used DO statement in it.

To check the result, you can check the CBO Application.

Conclusion

Working with Custom Business Objects in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL has been an enriching experience. The ability to create and manage custom objects, coupled with the power of ODATA APIs, opens up numerous possibilities for customization and integration.

I hope this post helps you get started with Custom Business Objects and ODATA APIs in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 3SL. Stay tuned for more insights and tutorials. Cloud Operations SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ABAP Extensibility SAP Community

entry.title: BAdI to change PMP0 value of PO Item
entry.content:
I would like to know that can we change value of PMP0 value in PO Item from BAdI logic.

I write logic in BAdI  MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM and it doesn't allow to update this value.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Calling S/4HANA OData api from custom logic fails : Error 403
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to call an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud OData V4 api from same SAP S/4HANA system within a custom logic. 

I have created below artefacts to achieve the same.

Custom Communication Scenario: YY1_SUPPLIER_CONFIRMATION_API

Communication System : ZS4H_OUTBOUND_API

Communication Arrangement : YY1_SUPPLIER_CONFIRMATION_API

'Check Connection' in communication arrangement is successful:

In 'Custom Logic' app, implemented BAdI for MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_HEADER (just to test the api call, actual requirement is to implement another BAdI).

check cl_abap_context_info=>get_user_technical_name( ) = 'CB9980000156'.

DATA lv_uri TYPE string.
    cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(
    EXPORTING
    communication_scenario = 'YY1_SUPPLIER_CONFIRMATION_API'
    outbound_service = 'YY1_GENERIC_API_REST'
    RECEIVING available = DATA(service_available)
    ) .

    IF service_available EQ abap_true.
*Create HTTP client to access the outbound service
      DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(
      communication_scenario = 'YY1_SUPPLIER_CONFIRMATION_API'
      outbound_service = 'YY1_GENERIC_API_REST'
      ).

      IF lo_client IS BOUND.
*Creation of the service request--Call to REST API which you plan to use
 lv_uri = '/Confirmation/5900000073'.

*Call the REST API by setting the header parameters
        DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).
        request->set_method( if_ble_http_request=>co_method-get
       )->set_resource_extension( lv_uri )
*        )->set_header_parameter( name = 'Content-Type'
*                                 value = 'application/json'
*        )->set_header_parameter( name = 'Accept'
*                                 value = 'application/json' ).
*        )->set_url_parameter(  name = '$format'
*                              value = 'json' )
.

        try.
          DATA(response) = lo_client->send( request ).

          CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(exception).
            CASE exception->status_code.
            WHEN 404.
* Error handling
            WHEN OTHERS.
* Error handling
        ENDCASE.
        endtry.

* Get the body of the response.
        DATA(lv_response_body) = response->get_body( ).
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

Here I am trying to read a particular Supplier Confirmation. But the execution fails with status code 403.

What is going wrong?

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Create a Custom field in a business context and map data to it from a field in CDS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to create a custom field in the Pricing (SD_PRICECOMHEAD) Business context in public cloud and then to get 'Account group' field data from the CDS view I_CustomerAccountGroup into the new custom field.

Is it possible to create a custom field in a business context and then link it to a Standard field from a CDS view to capture its data.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: How to consume API's from business Accelerator hub in ADT(Eclipse) using Service consumption Model
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to consume an API from business accelerator hub inside Public cloud Client 80 developer system.

I have created a communication arrangement using the communication scenario from accelerator hub with basic authentication user and i have also created a service consumption model inside ADT using the EDMX file. but while trying to implement the class I'm facing issues in configuring the destination and the basic authentication.

could you please help on how i can configure them using the communication arrangement details from Client 100 customizing system to call the API to consume data from it inside my class.

Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Quality Custom field data flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Stock - Multiple materials app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Quality Heat Number Flow in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I am new to Public Cloud so need you help and support

There is one requirement from our customer actually they want to record a value as Quality Heat Number while doing the Usage decision and flow that value in either Multiple Stock app or MMBE. So what we decided to publish a Custom field in Usage Decision and record value over there. So i need help in how to flow this custom field value in the apps i have mentioned above or if there any other solution please let me know or it can be achieved through any Business Context, Please tell me its very Urgent.

Raj

entry.title: Configure outbound Scenario from S/4 to CPI
entry.content:
We are into 2SL S4HANA Public CLoud , i need to run any outbound scenario from S/4 that hits to already connected CPI. What are the steps i need to perform to run this end to end scenario? 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Custom fields not edited in Purchase Requisition API
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts, currently I'm developing the V4 Purchase Requisition API (Overview | Purchase Requisition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub). It works fine doing the GET and PUT methods, but I noticed that the custom fields (YY1) are not being edited, I added them on the correct context (MM_PURREQN_ITEM) and they were added automatically on the API call template. The update is working correctly on standard fields so what could be missing in order to get custom fields edited? Someone has faced something similar?

For example, if I sent "22" in lv_new_quantity, after the call it keeps its old value "7", but in case of requisiton text field (purchase_requisition_ite_2) it is correctly modified.

* Prepare business data
        ls_business_data = VALUE #(
                  purchase_requisition        = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition"
                  purchase_requisition_item   = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_item"
                  purchasing_document         = ls_requisition-purchasing_document
                  purchasing_document_item    = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_item
                  pur_reqn_release_status     = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_release_status
                  purchasing_document_subtyp  = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_subtyp
                  purchasing_document_item_c  = ls_requisition-purchasing_document_item_c"
                  purchase_requisition_ite_2  = 'TEST API'
                  account_assignment_categor  = ls_requisition-account_assignment_categor"
                  material                    = ls_requisition-material"
                  material_group              = ls_requisition-material_group"
                  requested_quantity          = ls_requisition-requested_quantity"
                  base_unit                   = ls_requisition-base_unit
                  base_unit_isocode           = ls_requisition-base_unit_isocode"
                  purchase_requisition_price  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_price"
                  pur_reqn_price_quantity     = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_price_quantity"
                  material_goods_receipt_dur  = ls_requisition-material_goods_receipt_dur
                  purchasing_organization     = ls_requisition-purchasing_organization"
                  purchasing_group            = ls_requisition-purchasing_group"
                  plant                       = ls_requisition-plant"
                  company_code                = ls_requisition-company_code
                  source_of_supply_is_assign  = ls_requisition-source_of_supply_is_assign
                  supplying_plant             = ls_requisition-supplying_plant
                  ordered_quantity            = ls_requisition-ordered_quantity
                  delivery_date               = ls_requisition-delivery_date"
                  purchase_requisition_relea  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_relea"
                  processing_status           = ls_requisition-processing_status"
                  external_approval_status    = ls_requisition-external_approval_status
                  purchasing_info_record      = ls_requisition-purchasing_info_record"
                  supplier                    = ls_requisition-supplier"
                  is_deleted                  = ls_requisition-is_deleted
                  fixed_supplier              = ls_requisition-fixed_supplier"
                  requisitioner_name          = ls_requisition-requisitioner_name
                  created_by_user             = ls_requisition-created_by_user
                  pur_req_creation_date       = ls_requisition-pur_req_creation_date
                  pur_reqn_item_currency      = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_currency
                  material_planned_delivery   = ls_requisition-material_planned_delivery
                  deliv_date_category         = ls_requisition-deliv_date_category
                  multiple_acct_assgmt_distr  = ls_requisition-multiple_acct_assgmt_distr
                  storage_location            = ls_requisition-storage_location"
                  pur_reqn_ssprequestor       = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_ssprequestor
                  pur_reqn_sspauthor          = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspauthor
                  purchase_contract           = ls_requisition-purchase_contract"
                  pur_reqn_source_of_supply   = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_source_of_supply
                  purchase_contract_item      = ls_requisition-purchase_contract_item"
                  consumption_posting         = ls_requisition-consumption_posting
                  pur_reqn_origin             = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_origin
                  pur_reqn_sspcatalog         = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcatalog
                  pur_reqn_sspcatalog_item    = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcatalog_item
                  pur_reqn_sspcross_catalog   = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_sspcross_catalog
                  pur_reqn_item_blocking_sta  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_blocking_sta
                  pur_reqn_item_blocking_rea  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_blocking_rea
                  language                    = ls_requisition-language"
                  is_closed                   = ls_requisition-is_closed
                  release_is_not_completed    = ls_requisition-release_is_not_completed
                  service_performer           = ls_requisition-service_performer
                  product_type_code           = ls_requisition-product_type_code
                  performance_period_start_d  = ls_requisition-performance_period_start_d
                  performance_period_end_dat  = ls_requisition-performance_period_end_dat
                  purchase_order_price_type   = ls_requisition-purchase_order_price_type"
                  supplier_material_number    = ls_requisition-supplier_material_number"
                  batch                       = ls_requisition-batch
                  material_revision_level     = ls_requisition-material_revision_level
                  min_remaining_shelf_life    = ls_requisition-min_remaining_shelf_life
                  item_net_amount             = ls_requisition-item_net_amount
                  tax_code                    = ls_requisition-tax_code"
                  goods_receipt_is_expected   = ls_requisition-goods_receipt_is_expected"
                  invoice_is_expected         = ls_requisition-invoice_is_expected"
                  goods_receipt_is_non_valua  = ls_requisition-goods_receipt_is_non_valua"
                  requirement_tracking        = ls_requisition-requirement_tracking"
                  mrpcontroller               = ls_requisition-mrpcontroller
                  purchase_requisition_is_fi  = ls_requisition-purchase_requisition_is_fi
                  last_change_date_time       = ls_requisition-last_change_date_time
                  reservation                 = ls_requisition-reservation
                  item_delivery_address_id    = ls_requisition-item_delivery_address_id
                  pur_reqn_receiving_custome  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_receiving_custome
                  subcontractor               = ls_requisition-subcontractor
                  expected_overall_limit_amo  = ls_requisition-expected_overall_limit_amo"
                  overall_limit_amount        = ls_requisition-overall_limit_amount"
                  pur_contract_for_overall_l  = ls_requisition-pur_contract_for_overall_l
                  pur_contract_item_for_over  = ls_requisition-pur_contract_item_for_over
                  pur_reqn_external_referenc  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_external_referenc
                  pur_reqn_item_external_ref  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_item_external_ref"
                  pur_reqn_external_system_i  = ls_requisition-pur_reqn_external_system_i
                  procurement_hub_source_sys  = ls_requisition-procurement_hub_source_sys
                  sspauthor_external_bpidn_n  = ls_requisition-sspauthor_external_bpidn_n
                  sspreqr_user_id             = ls_requisition-sspreqr_user_id
                  yy_1_stock_actual_pri       = lv_new_quantity"
                  yy_1_stock_actual_priu      = ls_requisition-yy_1_stock_actual_priu"
                  yy_1_stockde_seguridad_pri  = ls_planning-safetystockquantity"
                  yy_1_stockde_seguridad_p_2  = ls_requisition-yy_1_stockde_seguridad_p_2"
                  yy_1_puntode_reorden_pri    = ls_planning-reorderthresholdquantity"
                  yy_1_puntode_reorden_priu   = ls_requisition-yy_1_puntode_reorden_priu "
                  yy_1_motivodetraslado_pri   = ls_requisition-yy_1_motivodetraslado_pri ). "

        " Navigate to the resource and create a request for the update operation
        lo_resource = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'PURCHASE_REQN_ITEM' )->navigate_with_key( ls_entity_key ).
        lo_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_update( /iwbep/if_cp_request_update=>gcs_update_semantic-put ).

        " Get Etag
        lo_read_request = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( ).
        DATA(lo_read_response) = lo_read_request->execute( ).
        DATA(lv_etag) = lo_read_response->get_etag( ).

        " ETag is needed
        " You need to retrieve it and then set it here
        ls_business_data-etag = lv_etag.
        lo_request->set_if_match( ls_business_data-etag ).

        lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).

        " Execute the request and retrieve the business data
        lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

entry.title: How to bulk upload data to a custom business object
entry.content:
Dear All.

I will create a custom business object to use as source data of Custom CDS View.

So, I want to add data(For Example : ID, TEXT) to a custom business object.

But I can't find that how to bulk upload data.

I understood that we can create Tile of Custom business object.

So, Please let me know that how to bulk upload data to a custom business object.
(by Tile or other methods)


Best Regards

entry.title: RAP: Unable Create multiple Outbound Delivery Splits from one Sales Order
entry.content:
G"day

We are busy Developing an urgent RAP App for to Create multiple Outbound Deliveries from one single Sales Order with one item.

For Example: From a single Sales Order Quantity with 400 BAGS( 1 item only)

Business require to Automatically Create 40 Outbound Deliveries(1 item each ) with Quantity = 10 BAGS each

We are having the below Technical challenges, can you please guide us:

  • Unable to use BAPI "BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS" with in the unmanaged Create or Save Methods.(also tried using DESTINATION "NONE"
  • Unable pass a specific Delivery Quantity to the BO "I_OutboundDeliveryTP" Create Method.
  • Unable to create multiple Outbound Deliveries within one Unmanaged Create/save Method.

I really appreciate your assistance in this regard.

Thank you

entry.title: Request Application Job Template for Custom Analytical Query Execution
entry.content:
As my client has requirement to schedule a job to execute Custom Analytical Query every month, do you have any suggestion for me?
as I cannot find any template related to Custom Analytical Query now.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Customisation on S4 HANA Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a custom OData Service developed on S4 HANA Server(on-premise), Can we move custom Odata service to S/4 Hana Public cloud system. ? If not then is there is a way to create custom odata service on Public Cloud?

Regards

PM

entry.title: Creating Custom Post-processing of the Output Payment File- SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD(ABAP CLOUD)
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently implementing custom post-processing logic for the output payment file generation.
However, we're facing an issue when a single payment includes multiple invoices.

The behavior we're experiencing is:

Three separate output files are being generated.

File 1 includes details of only the first invoice.

File 2 includes the first and second invoices.

File 3 includes all three invoices.

Our objective is to generate a single output file that contains all invoices related to the payment.

We have attempted debugging the process, but the BAdI (Business Add-In) we’re using is not getting triggered during this execution, even though the output files are being generated.

Has anyone encountered this issue before or have any insight on:

Why the BAdI might not be triggered?

How we can ensure that all invoice details are captured once in a single output file?

We referred the below link to Creating Custom Post-processing of the Output Payment File:

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-localization-as-a-self-service-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/creating-custom-post-processing-of-the-output-payment-file_fa31d25b-c161-4f02-a0b2-b8338533bd94

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Multiple datasources for custom Adobe Form
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Public Edition, you can create custom forms. This works great as long as you can use the SAP standard data providers (IDP). You can see where this is going... we can't use those, our data selection is completely custom and involves several data sources.

In this scenario you have no alternatives but to take control and build everything in a piece of custom coding. In our case, due to the need for other on-stack features/APIs, we built this code on stack as well. This is all still in a Public Edition environment.

A large part of the process is perfectly explained in this blog:
SAP Forms service by Adobe in SAP BTP, ABAP environment

There are several steps required to eventually get to the PDF form. A connection to the template store on BTP, a reference to a data service which exposes a CDS view, and of course in the end a method to combine form layout with form data. Very basic versions of all these steps are in place and do work.

" This creates the MT_OUTLINE structure that contains the data layout
data(lo_fdp_util) = cl_fp_fdp_services=>get_instance( 'ZSD_customform' ).

" Based on the key, this should always return a single top level record
data(lv_data) = lo_fdp_util->read_to_data( lt_keys ).     " In readable data format
data(lv_xml)  = lo_fdp_util->read_to_xml_v2( lt_keys ).   " In XML format
data(lv_xsd)  = lo_fdp_util->get_xsd_v2( ).               " In XSD schema format

Now comes the tricky bit. Besides having a CDS view as data source, we require to query an external data source as well. When loading the initial data service, SAP generates the data structure for you. Very convenient and it saves you the trouble of manually building the XML and XSD. This of course only includes the fields known to the data service, not the ones from the external data source.

What would be a sensible solution here? Manually creating the XSD feels wrong in every way. How can we integrate both data sources into a working XML file (for actual data) and XSD schema (for data layout)? That schema can then be uploaded to the template store.

entry.title: Clean core _Is appending fixed domain values to standard domains clean core compliant?
entry.content:
Hello Expert

In S/4HANA Cloud, it is technically possible to add fixed domain values by appending to a standard SAP domain using the domain append functionality (via SE11).

Before proceeding, I would like to understand:

  • Is adding fixed domain values by appending to a standard domain considered a violation of SAP’s clean core principles?

  • Will these appended values be retained during future system upgrades, or is there a risk they could be overwritten or lost?

  • What is the clean core-compliant alternative to extend or enhance domain values without modifying or appending to standard SAP domains?

Looking forward to your insights on the recommended best practice.

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Testing of Developer Extensibility in S4hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are into 3SL landscape of S4hana Public Cloud instance. We do have Key user extensibility(DEV-XYZ tenant) along with Developer extensibility(DEV-ABC tenant). 

We have created Class->Custom Entity-> Service Definition->Published Service Binding in DEV-ABC tenant using ADT. Now since we are into cross client , how do we test this in DEV-XYZ ???? bcz DEV-ABC doesnt have data and it only meant for ABAP tenant. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility
